description: Style NoteStylish formal trousers with a great style details, from arrow woman. Wear this pair with feminine tops or tees, tucked in or out, with a cool belt. Style this with a shoulder strap handbag and canvas shoes. Product DetailsBlack trousers, has a zipper and hook closure with an inner button fastening, two side pockets, two welt pockets at back, flat front and fitted at backWash care 73% polyester, 25% viscose and 2% lycraMachine or hand wash cold Do not bleachLine dry in shade Warm iron Size and FitSlim fitThe model (height 5'8" and waist 28") is wearing a size 28
